response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and mobile platform expertise, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and knowledge sharing
Broad technical stack spanning mobile, web, and systems programming with strong testing focus
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience beyond technical mentorship
Limited demonstration of mobile platform ecosystem experience despite iOS app maintenance
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning at scale
